<noinclude>
This is the "Experiment" form.
To create a page with this form, enter the page name below;
if a page with that name already exists, you will be sent to a form to edit that page.

{{#forminput:form=Experiment}}

</noinclude><includeonly>{{{info|page name=<Experiment[Base page]>/Experiment <unique number;start=1>}}}
<div id="wikiPreview" style="display: none; padding-bottom: 25px; margin-bottom: 25px; border-bottom: 1px solid #AAAAAA;"></div>
{{{for template|Experiment}}}{{{field|Base page|hidden}}}
{| class="formtable"
! Location of subjects: {{FieldTooltip|Location of subjects}}
| {{{field|Location of subjects|list|input type=tokens|existing values only|values={{#show:Property:Location of subjects|?Allows value}} }}}
|- {{#arraydefine: notspecified|Not specified}}<!--
   -->{{#arraydefine:hostspecies|{{#show:Property:Host species|?Allows value}}}}<!--
   -->{{#arraydiff: values|hostspecies|notspecified}}
! Host species: {{FieldTooltip|Host species}}
| {{{field|Host species|values={{#show:Property:Host species|?Allows value}}|mandatory|placeholder=Select|default=Not specified|input type=dropdown|values=Not specified,{{#arrayprint:values}} }}}
|-
! class="newtab"|Body site: {{#info: Anatomical site where microbial samples were extracted from according to the [https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon Uber Anatomy Ontology]}}<br><span class="small font-weight-normal">[https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/uberon Find a term]</span>
| {{{field|Body site|input type=tokens|existing values only|list|delimiter=;|semantic_query=((Category:Body site)) ((Glossary-Term::~*@*)) }}}
<div class="small">Use a semicolon as the multiple values delimiter.</div>
|-
!  class="newtab"|Condition: {{#info: The experimental condition / phenotype studied according to the [https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/efo Experimental Factor Ontology]}}<br><span class="small font-weight-normal">[https://www.ebi.ac.uk/ols/ontologies/efo Find a term]</span>
| {{{field|Condition|input type=tokens|existing values only|list|delimiter=;|semantic_query=((Category:Condition)) ((Glossary-Term::~*@*)) }}}
<div class="small">Use a semicolon as the multiple values delimiter.</div>
|-
! Group 0 name: {{FieldTooltip|Group 0 name}}
| {{{field|Group 0 name|property=Group 0 name}}}
|-
! Group 1 name: {{FieldTooltip|Group 1 name}}
| {{{field|Group 1 name|property=Group 1 name}}}
|-
! Group 1 definition: {{FieldTooltip|Group 1 definition}}
| {{{field|Group 1 definition|input type=textarea|property=Group 1 definition}}}
|-
! Group 0 sample size: {{FieldTooltip|Group 0 sample size}}
| {{{field|Group 0 sample size|property=Group 0 sample size}}}
|-
! Group 1 sample size: {{FieldTooltip|Group 1 sample size}}
| {{{field|Group 1 sample size|property=Group 1 sample size}}}
|-
! Antibiotics exclusion: {{FieldTooltip|Antibiotics exclusion}}
| {{{field|Antibiotics exclusion|input type=textarea|property=Antibiotics exclusion}}}
|}

== Lab analysis ==
{|
! Sequencing type: {{FieldTooltip|Sequencing type}}
| {{{field|Sequencing type|show on select=16S=>16S_regions|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:Sequencing type|?Allows value}} }}}
{| id="16S_regions"
! 16S variable region (lower bound): {{FieldTooltip|16S variable region (lower bound)}}
| V {{{field|16S variable region (lower bound)|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:16S variable region|?Allows value}} }}}
|-
! 16S variable region (upper bound - only set if needed): {{FieldTooltip|16S variable region (upper bound)}}
| V {{{field|16S variable region (upper bound)|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:16S variable region|?Allows value}} }}}
|}
|-
! Sequencing platform: {{FieldTooltip|Sequencing platform}}
| {{{field|Sequencing platform|values={{#show:Property:Sequencing platform|?Allows value}}|existing values only|list|input type=tokens}}}
|}

== Statistical Analysis  ==
{|
! Data transformation: {{FieldTooltip|Data transformation}}
| {{{field|Data transformation|values={{#show:Property:Data transformation|?Allows value}}|input type=dropdown}}}
|-
! Statistical test: {{FieldTooltip|Statistical test}}
| {{{field|Statistical test|values={{#show:Property:Statistical test|?Allows value}}|existing values only|list|input type=tokens}}}
|-
! Significance threshold: {{FieldTooltip|Significance threshold}}
| {{{field|Significance threshold|property=Significance threshold}}}
|-
! MHT correction: {{FieldTooltip|MHT correction}}
| {{{field|MHT correction|property=MHT correction|input type=dropdown|}}}
|-
! LDA Score above: {{FieldTooltip|LDA Score above}}
| {{{field|LDA Score above|property=LDA Score above}}}
|-
! Matched on: {{FieldTooltip|Matched on}}
| {{{field|Matched on|list|input type=tokens|values={{#show:Property:Matched on|?Allows value|limit=1000|searchlabel=}} }}}
|-
! Confounders controlled for: {{FieldTooltip|Confounders controlled for}}
| {{{field|Confounders controlled for|list|input type=tokens|values={{#show:Property:Confounders controlled for|?Allows value|limit=1000|searchlabel=}} }}}
|}
== Alpha Diversity ==
{|
! Pielou: {{FieldTooltip|Pielou}}
| {{{field|Pielou|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:Pielou|?Allows value}} }}}
|-
! Shannon: {{FieldTooltip|Shannon}}
| {{{field|Shannon|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:Shannon|?Allows value}} }}}
|-
! Chao1: {{FieldTooltip|Chao1}}
| {{{field|Chao1|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:Chao1|?Allows value}} }}}
|-
! Simpson: {{FieldTooltip|Simpson}}
| {{{field|Simpson|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:Simpson|?Allows value}} }}}
|-
! Inverse Simpson: {{FieldTooltip|Inverse Simpson}}
| {{{field|Inverse Simpson|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:Inverse Simpson|?Allows value}} }}}
|-
! Richness: {{FieldTooltip|Richness}}
| {{{field|Richness|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:Richness|?Allows value}} }}}
|-
! Faith: {{FieldTooltip|Faith}}
| {{{field|Faith|input type=dropdown|values={{#show:Property:Faith|?Allows value}} }}}
|}
{{Form:State fields}}
{{{end template}}}

{{{standard input|save}}}
__NOTOC____NOEDITSECTION__</includeonly>
